channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Box containing human head reportedly found on sidewalk of Chicago's West Side: report
item.description: Authorities in Chicago are investigating after a witness said they found a box on the sidewalk near the city's West Side that contained a human head.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 1 killed, dozens rescued after mine equipment malfunction near Cripple Creek
item.description: Workers successfully rescued 23 people on Thursday from a former Colorado gold mine, now operated as a tourist site, including 12 people who were trapped about 1,000 feet underground, officials announced late Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Heather Willard, KRON4

item.title: Residents clean up and figure out what's next after Milton
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Florida residents were continuing to repair the damage from Hurricane Milton and figure out what to do next Friday after the storm smashed through coastal communities and tore homes to pieces, flooded streets and spawned a barrage of deadly tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: JULIO CORTEZ, KATE PAYNE and HAVEN DALEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: US House control teeters on the unlikely battleground of heavily Democratic California
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — California’s reputation as a hothouse of progressive politics is being tested in a string of U.S. House contests that are again expected to play into which party controls the chamber next year.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. BLOOD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ethel Kennedy, social activist and wife of Robert F. Kennedy, has died
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ethel Kennedy, the wife of Sen. Robert F. Kennedy, who raised their 11 children after he was assassinated and remained dedicated to social causes and the family’s legacy for decades thereafter, died on Thursday, her family said. She was 96.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY and STEVE LeBLANC, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about Hurricane Milton after it slammed Florida's Gulf Coast
item.description: As Hurricane Milton barreled into and across Florida, it spawned dozens of tornadoes, knocked out power to millions, damaged homes, flooded neighborhoods and led to hundreds of rescues. But the damage wasn't as bad as had been feared. Gov.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Biden suggests Trump 'get a life' after false hurricane claims
item.description: “Mr. President Trump, former President Trump, get a life man, help these people,” Biden said in remarks on Hurricane Milton from the White House.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KRON4

item.title: Hurricane Milton disrupts Yom Kippur plans for Jews in Florida
item.description: WINTER PARK, Florida (AP) — Many Jews worldwide will mark Yom Kippur in fasting and prayer at their synagogues this weekend.
item.dc:creator: MARIAM FAM, GIOVANNA DELL'ORTO and HOLLY MEYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Viral Tampa sensation 'Lieutenant Dan,' who rode out Hurricane Milton in boat, describes how he survived
item.description: A Florida man named Joseph Malinowski, referred to by Tampa locals as "Lt. Dan," went viral on TikTok before his criminal background was revealed to users.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Internet Archive data breach exposes more than 31 million user accounts: reports
item.description: The Internet Archive, a popular digital library known for its Wayback Machine, was hacked and suffered a breach that reportedly exposed the data of 31 million user accounts.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Condemned inmate Richard Moore wants someone other than South Carolina's governor to decide clemency
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — A South Carolina inmate scheduled to be executed in just over three weeks is asking a federal judge to take away the power of granting clemency from the governor who is a former state attorney general and place it with a parole board.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A federal judge rejects a call to reopen voter registration in Georgia after Hurricane Helene
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A federal judge said Thursday that she won't order the presidential battleground state of Georgia to reopen voter registration for November’s elections despite recent disruptions to registration caused by Hurricane Helene. U.S.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Coast Guard video shows helicopter crew rescue man floating on a cooler 30 miles off Florida coast after storm
item.description: A man clinging to a cooler 30 miles off the coast of Longboat Key, Florida, was rescued by a Coast Guard helicopter crew the day after Hurricane Milton battered the state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hurricane Milton spawned high number of destructive, deadly tornadoes
item.description: FT. PIERCE, Fla. (AP) — Dozens of tornadoes spawned by Hurricane Milton caught many Floridians by surprise as they braced for heavy rain, strong winds and storm surges. Violent twisters were seen crossing highways, ripping off roofs and downing trees and power lines.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANY MATAT, ISABELLA O'MALLEY and SUMAN NAISHADHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Prosecutors reviewing 'new evidence' in Marilyn Manson sexual abuse probe
item.description: The sex crimes division of the Los Angeles County District Attorney’s Office is reviewing new leads and evidence in the investigation into shock-rocker Marilyn Manson, who has been accused by multiple women, including “Westworld” actor Evan Rachel Wood, of sexual abuse, officials announced Wednesday
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton’s winds topple crane that was building west Florida’s tallest residential tower
item.description: The mayor in St. Petersburg, Florida, warned residents that cranes at several construction projects across the city might fall in Hurricane Milton and at the storm's peak on Wednesday night, one came crashing down.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida deputies rescue boy floating on piece of fence in floodwaters
item.description: A Florida boy floating in the flooded water in Tampa was rescued by sheriff's deputies on a patrol boat, authorities said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Delphi prepares for upcoming double murder trial of Richard Allen
item.description: Authorities will restrict access to the Carroll County courthouse during the anticipated four-week-long trial
item.dc:creator: Russ McQuaid, NewsNation

item.title: Milton by the numbers: At least 5 dead, at least 12 tornadoes, 3.4M without power
item.description: Hurricane Milton's explosive formation stirred high anxiety for Florida less than two weeks after Helene raked the state and much of the Southeast. On Thursday, authorities were still assessing the damage, even as Gov. Ron DeSantis said it fell short of “the worst-case scenario.
item.dc:creator: MARY KATHERINE WILDEMAN and CHRISTOPHER L. KELLER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump visits Aurora after Venezuelan gang claims
item.description: The Trump campaign called Aurora a "war zone" in its rally announcement. The city's Republican mayor disagrees.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: VIDEO: Alligator seen attacking a tire in floodwaters after Hurricane Milton
item.description: A vehicle driving through Lee County was attacked by an alligator as it drove through watery roadways after storms hit the area.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WATCH: Cruise ship battles rough seas in Gulf of Mexico during hurricane
item.description: Gulf of Mexico (Oct. 10, 2024) — The Harmony of the Seas, a Royal Caribbean cruise ship, faced rough seas in the Gulf of Mexico on October 8, 2024, as Hurricane Milton disrupted its scheduled voyage.
item.dc:creator: Brody Wooddell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Fisher-Price recalls over 2 million infant swings after 5 deaths reported
item.description: A recall has been issued for more than 2 million Fisher-Price infant swings after five deaths were reported.
item.dc:creator: Mac Bell, NewsNation

item.title: Rare comet visible in the night sky won't return for 80,000 years
item.description: A rare comet is expected to be visible to the naked eye across the Northern Hemisphere for several weeks in October.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Robles, Fox 5

item.title: 14-year-old found floating on fence in Tampa floodwaters after Hurricane Milton
item.description: A 14-year-old had to be rescued after Hurricane Milton's floodwaters trapped him on a floating fence in the middle of Tampa.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Bacon hogs the spotlight in election debates, but reasons for its sizzling inflation are complex
item.description: She blames greedy companies for price-gouging. He blames the Biden administration’s economic policies. Kamala Harris and Donald Trump agree on one thing: Tapping into sour consumer sentiment about high grocery prices is one way to court voters. Bacon prices have been a particular focus for Trump.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tennis legend Rafael Nadal, 22-time Grand Slam champ, announces retirement
item.description: Rafael Nadal, professional tennis legend and 22-time Grand Slam champion announced his retirement in a video message early Thursday morning.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KTLA 5

item.title: CNN's Anderson Cooper hit by flying object during Milton live shot
item.description: CNN’s Anderson Cooper was hit by a flying object on Wednesday during a live shot while reporting from Florida on Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KRON4

item.title: Rafael Nadal, 22-time Grand Slam tennis champ, announces retirement
item.description: Rafael Nadal, professional tennis legend and 22-time Grand Slam champion announced his retirement in a video message early Thursday morning.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KRON4

item.title: The Latest: Hurricane Milton weakens to Category 1, but danger remains in Florida
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall Wednesday along Florida’s Gulf Coast as a Category 3 storm, bringing powerful winds, deadly storm surge and potential flooding to much of the state. Milton drew fuel from exceedingly warm Gulf of Mexico waters, twice reaching Category 5 status.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Immigrants brought to the US as children ask judges to keep protections against deportation
item.description: Immigrants who were brought to the U.S. illegally as children were among more than 200 demonstrators who gathered outside a federal courthouse in New Orleans where appellate judges heard arguments over a policy shielding them from deportation.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Mcgill And Jack Brook, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Taylor Swift donates $5 million to Hurricane Helene and Milton relief efforts
item.description: “This contribution will help communities rebuild and recover, providing essential food, clean water, and supplies to people affected by these devastating storms," Feeding America CEO Claire Babineaux-Fontenot said.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Will we see northern lights, power grid impacts amid 'severe' geomagnetic storm?
item.description: Earth is being hit by a strong solar radiation storm event that will be followed by a geomagnetic storm, space weather officials say.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KRON4

item.title: Tropical dictionary: Words to know as active hurricane season continues
item.description: Let’s dive into some of the frequently used words and phrases that are on repeat during this busy week of hurricane season.
item.dc:creator: Alex Schneider, KRON4

item.title: Plane makes emergency landing in New York City after pilot dies mid-flight
item.description: Crew members on the Turkish Airlines flight worked to revive the pilot, but he died before the plane landed.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chipotle announces the return of its ‘Boorito’ promotion
item.description: Chipotle is celebrating the spookiest of holidays with the return of its popular “Boo-rito” promotion. During the promotion, rewards members can purchase entrees for $6 and enjoy extended store hours. Only rewards members who order in-store can take advantage of the promo.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: The mayor of a state capital in Mexico is killed less than 1 week after he took office
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Relatives on Monday buried the mayor of a state capital in southern Mexico who was killed just one week after he took office. Photos of the crime scene shared on social media showed Mayor Alejandro Arcos’ severed head had been left on the roof of a pickup truck.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
